narrative:
Chester Township has 1,606 registered voters, with 46.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.3 percentage points.
